predicate_mappings.intake_assignment: the intake assignment for {} is through {}
predicate_mappings.isolation_room_ready: the isolation room is ready for {}
predicate_mappings.multidisciplinary_assigned: {} is assigned to a multidisciplinary team
predicate_mappings.ppe_verified: personal protective equipment is verified for {}
predicate_mappings.lab_authorization: lab authorization is given for {} for {}
predicate_mappings.specimen_routed: the specimen for {} is routed to {}
predicate_mappings.monitoring_ready_flag: the monitoring ready flag is set for {}
predicate_mappings.env_service_team_available: the environmental service team {} is available

predicate_mappings.bed_compatible_with_case: {} is compatible with the patient case {}
predicate_mappings.supply_compatible_with_case: {} is compatible with the patient case {}
predicate_mappings.protocol_applicable_to_case: {} is applicable to the patient case {}
predicate_mappings.transport_assignable_to_case: {} is assignable to the patient case {}
predicate_mappings.device_compatible_with_case: {} is compatible with the patient case {}

preconditions: I can only register a case entity A if it is not the case that the case A is registered and it is not the case that isolation is cleared for A
effects: Once I register a case entity A, it is the case that the case A is registered

assign_intake_channel.description: assign an intake channel B to a case entity A
preconditions: I can only assign an intake channel B to a case entity A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the intake channel B is available and B is compatible with the patient case A
I can only assign an intake channel B to a case entity A if it is not the case that A has been allocated for intake
effects: Once I assign an intake channel B to a case entity A, it is the case that the intake assignment for A is through B and A has been allocated for intake
Once I assign an intake channel B to a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that the intake channel B is available

release_intake_channel_allocation.description: release allocation of an intake channel B from a case entity A
preconditions: I can only release allocation of an intake channel B from a case entity A if it is the case that the intake assignment for A is through B
I can only release allocation of an intake channel B from a case entity A if it is not the case that A has an admitted flag and it is not the case that A is assigned to a multidisciplinary team
effects: Once I release allocation of an intake channel B from a case entity A, it is the case that the intake channel B is available

Once I release allocation of an intake channel B from a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that the intake assignment for A is through B and it is not the case anymore that A has been allocated for intake and it is not the case anymore that A has been cleared for precontact and it is not the case anymore that the isolation room is ready for A and it is not the case anymore that ppe is allocated to A and it is not the case anymore that care is initiated for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires enhanced monitoring

reserve_isolation_room.description: reserve an isolation room B for a case entity A
preconditions: I can only reserve an isolation room B for a case entity A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the isolation room B is available
effects: Once I reserve an isolation room B for a case entity A, it is the case that A has a room reservation for B
Once I reserve an isolation room B for a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that the isolation room B is available

cancel_isolation_room_reservation.description: cancel reservation of an isolation room B for a case entity A
preconditions: I can only cancel reservation of an isolation room B for a case entity A if it is the case that A has a room reservation for B
effects: Once I cancel reservation of an isolation room B for a case entity A, it is the case that the isolation room B is available
Once I cancel reservation of an isolation room B for a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that A has a room reservation for B

confirm_room_preparation.description: confirm preparation of an isolation room B for a case entity A
preconditions: I can only confirm preparation of an isolation room B for a case entity A if it is the case that the case A is registered and A has been allocated for intake and A has a room reservation for B
I can only confirm preparation of an isolation room B for a case entity A if it is not the case that A has been cleared for precontact
effects: Once I confirm preparation of an isolation room B for a case entity A, it is the case that A has been cleared for precontact

assign_ppe_kit_to_case.description: assign a ppe kit B to a case entity A
preconditions: I can only assign a ppe kit B to a case entity A if it is the case that the case A is registered and A has been allocated for intake and the ppe kit B is available
I can only assign a ppe kit B to a case entity A if it is not the case that A has been cleared for precontact
effects: Once I assign a ppe kit B to a case entity A, it is the case that A has been cleared for precontact and ppe is allocated to A
Once I assign a ppe kit B to a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that the ppe kit B is available

perform_environmental_turnover.description: perform environmental turnover for a case entity A in an isolation room B with an environmental service team C
preconditions: I can only perform environmental turnover for a case entity A in an isolation room B with an environmental service team C if it is the case that A has been cleared for precontact and A has been allocated for intake and A has a room reservation for B and the environmental service team C is available
I can only perform environmental turnover for a case entity A in an isolation room B with an environmental service team C if it is not the case that the isolation room is ready for A
effects: Once I perform environmental turnover for a case entity A in an isolation room B with an environmental service team C, it is the case that the isolation room is ready for A
Once I perform environmental turnover for a case entity A in an isolation room B with an environmental service team C, it is not the case anymore that ppe is allocated to A

collect_and_prepare_specimen.description: collect and prepare specimen for a case entity A with a laboratory service B
preconditions: I can only collect and prepare specimen for a case entity A with a laboratory service B if it is the case that A has been allocated for intake and the specimen for A is routed to B
I can only collect and prepare specimen for a case entity A with a laboratory service B if it is not the case that the isolation room is ready for A
effects: Once I collect and prepare specimen for a case entity A with a laboratory service B, it is the case that the isolation room is ready for A
Once I collect and prepare specimen for a case entity A with a laboratory service B, it is not the case anymore that ppe is allocated to A

reserve_clinical_supply.description: reserve a clinical supply B for a case entity A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinical supply B for a case entity A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the supply B is available and B is compatible with the patient case A
effects: Once I reserve a clinical supply B for a case entity A, it is the case that B is assigned to A
Once I reserve a clinical supply B for a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that the supply B is available

release_clinical_supply.description: release a clinical supply B from a case entity A
preconditions: I can only release a clinical supply B from a case entity A if it is the case that B is assigned to A
effects: Once I release a clinical supply B from a case entity A, it is the case that the supply B is available
Once I release a clinical supply B from a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A

apply_isolation_protocol.description: apply an isolation protocol B to a case entity A
preconditions: I can only apply an isolation protocol B to a case entity A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the protocol B is available and B is applicable to the patient case A
effects: Once I apply an isolation protocol B to a case entity A, it is the case that B is assigned to A
Once I apply an isolation protocol B to a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that the protocol B is available

release_isolation_protocol.description: release an isolation protocol B from a case entity A
preconditions: I can only release an isolation protocol B from a case entity A if it is the case that B is assigned to A
effects: Once I release an isolation protocol B from a case entity A, it is the case that the protocol B is available
Once I release an isolation protocol B from a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A

reserve_transport_asset.description: reserve a transport asset B for a case entity A
preconditions: I can only reserve a transport asset B for a case entity A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the transport asset B is available and B is assignable to the patient case A
effects: Once I reserve a transport asset B for a case entity A, it is the case that B is assigned to A
Once I reserve a transport asset B for a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that the transport asset B is available

release_transport_asset.description: release a transport asset B from a case entity A
preconditions: I can only release a transport asset B from a case entity A if it is the case that B is assigned to A
effects: Once I release a transport asset B from a case entity A, it is the case that the transport asset B is available
Once I release a transport asset B from a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A

reserve_specimen_kit.description: reserve a specimen kit B for a case entity A
preconditions: I can only reserve a specimen kit B for a case entity A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the specimen kit B is available and B is required for the patient case A
effects: Once I reserve a specimen kit B for a case entity A, it is the case that B is assigned to A
Once I reserve a specimen kit B for a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that the specimen kit B is available

release_specimen_kit.description: release a specimen kit B from a case entity A
preconditions: I can only release a specimen kit B from a case entity A if it is the case that B is assigned to A
effects: Once I release a specimen kit B from a case entity A, it is the case that the specimen kit B is available
Once I release a specimen kit B from a case entity A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A

assign_bed_and_admit.description: assign an inpatient bed B and admit a case entity A with a clinical supply C and an isolation protocol D
preconditions: I can only assign an inpatient bed B and admit a case entity A with a clinical supply C and an isolation protocol D if it is the case that A has been allocated for intake and C is assigned to A and D is assigned to A and the bed B is available and B is compatible with the patient case A
I can only assign an inpatient bed B and admit a case entity A with a clinical supply C and an isolation protocol D if it is not the case that A has an admitted flag
effects: Once I assign an inpatient bed B and admit a case entity A with a clinical supply C and an isolation protocol D, it is the case that B is assigned to A and A has an admitted flag
Once I assign an inpatient bed B and admit a case entity A with a clinical supply C and an isolation protocol D, it is not the case anymore that the bed B is available

assign_bed_with_diagnostic_device_and_ad.description: assign an inpatient bed B and a diagnostic device D and admit a case entity A with a transport asset C
preconditions: I can only assign an inpatient bed B and a diagnostic device D and admit a case entity A with a transport asset C if it is the case that A has been allocated for intake and C is assigned to A and the diagnostic device D is available and the bed B is available and B is compatible with the patient case A and D is compatible with the patient case A
I can only assign an inpatient bed B and a diagnostic device D and admit a case entity A with a transport asset C if it is not the case that A has an admitted flag
effects: Once I assign an inpatient bed B and a diagnostic device D and admit a case entity A with a transport asset C, it is the case that B is assigned to A and A has an admitted flag and A requires enhanced monitoring and ppe is allocated to A

Once I assign an inpatient bed B and a diagnostic device D and admit a case entity A with a transport asset C, it is not the case anymore that the bed B is available and it is not the case anymore that the diagnostic device D is available

complete_initial_admission_status.description: complete initial admission status for a case entity A with a clinical supply B and an isolation protocol C
preconditions: I can only complete initial admission status for a case entity A with a clinical supply B and an isolation protocol C if it is the case that A has an admitted flag and A requires enhanced monitoring and B is assigned to A and C is assigned to A
effects: Once I complete initial admission status for a case entity A with a clinical supply B and an isolation protocol C, it is not the case anymore that A requires enhanced monitoring and it is not the case anymore that ppe is allocated to A

initiate_multidisciplinary_care.description: initiate multidisciplinary care for a case entity A with a clinical supply B, an isolation protocol C, and a nurse team D
preconditions: I can only initiate multidisciplinary care for a case entity A with a clinical supply B, an isolation protocol C, and a nurse team D if it is the case that the isolation room is ready for A and A has an admitted flag and B is assigned to A and C is assigned to A and D is eligible for the patient case A

I can only initiate multidisciplinary care for a case entity A with a clinical supply B, an isolation protocol C, and a nurse team D if it is not the case that ppe is allocated to A and it is not the case that A is assigned to a multidisciplinary team
effects: Once I initiate multidisciplinary care for a case entity A with a clinical supply B, an isolation protocol C, and a nurse team D, it is the case that A is assigned to a multidisciplinary team

assign_multidisciplinary_with_physician.description: assign multidisciplinary team with physician for a case entity A using a transport asset B, a specimen kit C, and a physician team D
preconditions: I can only assign multidisciplinary team with physician for a case entity A using a transport asset B, a specimen kit C, and a physician team D if it is the case that the isolation room is ready for A and A has an admitted flag and B is assigned to A and C is assigned to A and D is eligible for the patient case A

I can only assign multidisciplinary team with physician for a case entity A using a transport asset B, a specimen kit C, and a physician team D if it is not the case that A is assigned to a multidisciplinary team
effects: Once I assign multidisciplinary team with physician for a case entity A using a transport asset B, a specimen kit C, and a physician team D, it is the case that A is assigned to a multidisciplinary team and ppe is allocated to A

progress_care_to_active_management.description: progress care to active management for a case entity A using a clinical supply B and an isolation protocol C
preconditions: I can only progress care to active management for a case entity A using a clinical supply B and an isolation protocol C if it is the case that A is assigned to a multidisciplinary team and ppe is allocated to A and B is assigned to A and C is assigned to A
effects: Once I progress care to active management for a case entity A using a clinical supply B and an isolation protocol C, it is the case that care is initiated for A

Once I progress care to active management for a case entity A using a clinical supply B and an isolation protocol C, it is not the case anymore that ppe is allocated to A and it is not the case anymore that the isolation room is ready for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires enhanced monitoring

reprepare_room_after_turnover.description: reprepare an isolation room B after turnover for a case entity A with an environmental service team C
preconditions: I can only reprepare an isolation room B after turnover for a case entity A with an environmental service team C if it is the case that care is initiated for A and A is assigned to a multidisciplinary team and A has been allocated for intake and A has a room reservation for B and the environmental service team C is available
I can only reprepare an isolation room B after turnover for a case entity A with an environmental service team C if it is not the case that the isolation room is ready for A
effects: Once I reprepare an isolation room B after turnover for a case entity A with an environmental service team C, it is the case that the isolation room is ready for A

verify_provider_readiness.description: verify provider readiness for a case entity A in an isolation room B
preconditions: I can only verify provider readiness for a case entity A in an isolation room B if it is the case that A is assigned to a multidisciplinary team and the isolation room is ready for A and A has a room reservation for B

I can only verify provider readiness for a case entity A in an isolation room B if it is not the case that ppe is allocated to A and it is not the case that personal protective equipment is verified for A
effects: Once I verify provider readiness for a case entity A in an isolation room B, it is the case that personal protective equipment is verified for A

verify_provider_readiness_with_ppe_kit.description: verify provider readiness for a case entity A using a ppe kit B
preconditions: I can only verify provider readiness for a case entity A using a ppe kit B if it is the case that A is assigned to a multidisciplinary team and the isolation room is ready for A and the ppe kit B is available
I can only verify provider readiness for a case entity A using a ppe kit B if it is not the case that ppe is allocated to A and it is not the case that personal protective equipment is verified for A
effects: Once I verify provider readiness for a case entity A using a ppe kit B, it is the case that personal protective equipment is verified for A
Once I verify provider readiness for a case entity A using a ppe kit B, it is not the case anymore that the ppe kit B is available

route_specimen_to_lab_service.description: route specimen for a case entity A to a laboratory service B
preconditions: I can only route specimen for a case entity A to a laboratory service B if it is the case that personal protective equipment is verified for A and the laboratory service B is available and B is linked to the patient case A
effects: Once I route specimen for a case entity A to a laboratory service B, it is the case that A is linked to the laboratory service B
Once I route specimen for a case entity A to a laboratory service B, it is not the case anymore that the laboratory service B is available

authorize_lab_routing.description: authorize lab routing for a workflow coordinator A by a staff member B to a laboratory service C
preconditions: I can only authorize lab routing for a workflow coordinator A by a staff member B to a laboratory service C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A requires lab processing and lab authorization is given for A for C and B is linked to the laboratory service C
I can only authorize lab routing for a workflow coordinator A by a staff member B to a laboratory service C if it is not the case that the specimen for A is routed to C
effects: Once I authorize lab routing for a workflow coordinator A by a staff member B to a laboratory service C, it is the case that the specimen for A is routed to C

perform_room_turnover_check.description: perform room turnover check for a case entity A in an isolation room B with an environmental service team C
preconditions: I can only perform room turnover check for a case entity A in an isolation room B with an environmental service team C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A requires lab processing and the isolation room is ready for A and personal protective equipment is verified for A and A has a room reservation for B and the environmental service team C is available
I can only perform room turnover check for a case entity A in an isolation room B with an environmental service team C if it is not the case that the monitoring ready flag is set for A
effects: Once I perform room turnover check for a case entity A in an isolation room B with an environmental service team C, it is the case that the monitoring ready flag is set for A

mark_isolation_cleared.description: mark isolation cleared for a case entity A
preconditions: I can only mark isolation cleared for a case entity A if it is the case that A requires isolation and the case A is registered and A has been allocated for intake and A has an admitted flag and A is assigned to a multidisciplinary team and personal protective equipment is verified for A and the isolation room is ready for A
I can only mark isolation cleared for a case entity A if it is not the case that isolation is cleared for A
effects: Once I mark isolation cleared for a case entity A, it is the case that isolation is cleared for A

mark_isolation_cleared_with_lab_result.description: mark isolation cleared for a case entity A with lab result from a laboratory service B
preconditions: I can only mark isolation cleared for a case entity A with lab result from a laboratory service B if it is the case that A requires lab processing and the case A is registered and A has been allocated for intake and A has an admitted flag and A is assigned to a multidisciplinary team and personal protective equipment is verified for A and the isolation room is ready for A and the specimen for A is routed to B
I can only mark isolation cleared for a case entity A with lab result from a laboratory service B if it is not the case that isolation is cleared for A
effects: Once I mark isolation cleared for a case entity A with lab result from a laboratory service B, it is the case that isolation is cleared for A

mark_isolation_cleared_with_monitoring.description: mark isolation cleared for a case entity A with monitoring
preconditions: I can only mark isolation cleared for a case entity A with monitoring if it is the case that A requires lab processing and the case A is registered and A has been allocated for intake and A has an admitted flag and A is assigned to a multidisciplinary team and personal protective equipment is verified for A and the isolation room is ready for A and the monitoring ready flag is set for A
I can only mark isolation cleared for a case entity A with monitoring if it is not the case that isolation is cleared for A
effects: Once I mark isolation cleared for a case entity A with monitoring, it is the case that isolation is cleared for A

action_nl_templates.assign_intake_channel: assign intake channel {?intake_channel} to case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_intake_channel_allocation: release allocation of intake channel {?intake_channel} from case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_isolation_room: reserve isolation room {?isolation_room} for case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.cancel_isolation_room_reservation: cancel reservation of isolation room {?isolation_room} for case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_room_preparation: confirm preparation of isolation room {?isolation_room} for case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_ppe_kit_to_case: assign ppe kit {?ppe_kit} to case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.perform_environmental_turnover: perform environmental turnover for case entity {?patient_case} in isolation room {?isolation_room} with environmental service team {?environmental_service_team}
action_nl_templates.collect_and_prepare_specimen: collect and prepare specimen for case entity {?patient_case} with laboratory service {?laboratory_service}
action_nl_templates.reserve_clinical_supply: reserve clinical supply {?clinical_supply} for case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_clinical_supply: release clinical supply {?clinical_supply} from case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_isolation_protocol: apply isolation protocol {?isolation_protocol} to case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_isolation_protocol: release isolation protocol {?isolation_protocol} from case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_transport_asset: reserve transport asset {?transport_asset} for case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_transport_asset: release transport asset {?transport_asset} from case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_specimen_kit: reserve specimen kit {?specimen_kit} for case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_specimen_kit: release specimen kit {?specimen_kit} from case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_bed_and_admit: assign inpatient bed {?inpatient_bed} and admit case entity {?patient_case} with clinical supply {?clinical_supply} and isolation protocol {?isolation_protocol}
action_nl_templates.assign_bed_with_diagnostic_device_and_ad: assign inpatient bed {?inpatient_bed} and diagnostic device {?diagnostic_device} and admit case entity {?patient_case} with transport asset {?transport_asset}
action_nl_templates.complete_initial_admission_status: complete initial admission status for case entity {?patient_case} with clinical supply {?clinical_supply} and isolation protocol {?isolation_protocol}
action_nl_templates.initiate_multidisciplinary_care: initiate multidisciplinary care for case entity {?patient_case} with clinical supply {?clinical_supply}, isolation protocol {?isolation_protocol}, and nurse team {?nurse_team}
action_nl_templates.assign_multidisciplinary_with_physician: assign multidisciplinary team with physician for case entity {?patient_case} using transport asset {?transport_asset}, specimen kit {?specimen_kit}, and physician team {?physician_team}
action_nl_templates.progress_care_to_active_management: progress care to active management for case entity {?patient_case} using clinical supply {?clinical_supply} and isolation protocol {?isolation_protocol}
action_nl_templates.reprepare_room_after_turnover: reprepare isolation room {?isolation_room} after turnover for case entity {?patient_case} with environmental service team {?environmental_service_team}
action_nl_templates.verify_provider_readiness: verify provider readiness for case entity {?patient_case} in isolation room {?isolation_room}
action_nl_templates.verify_provider_readiness_with_ppe_kit: verify provider readiness for case entity {?patient_case} using ppe kit {?ppe_kit}
action_nl_templates.route_specimen_to_lab_service: route specimen for case entity {?patient_case} to laboratory service {?laboratory_service}
action_nl_templates.authorize_lab_routing: authorize lab routing for workflow coordinator {?workflow_coordinator} by staff member {?staff_member} to laboratory service {?laboratory_service}
action_nl_templates.perform_room_turnover_check: perform room turnover check for case entity {?patient_case} in isolation room {?isolation_room} with environmental service team {?environmental_service_team}
action_nl_templates.mark_isolation_cleared: mark isolation cleared for case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.mark_isolation_cleared_with_lab_result: mark isolation cleared for case entity {?patient_case} with lab result from laboratory service {?laboratory_service}
action_nl_templates.mark_isolation_cleared_with_monitoring: mark isolation cleared for case entity {?patient_case} with monitoring

predicate_nl_templates.intake_assignment: the intake assignment for {?patient_case} is through {?intake_channel}
predicate_nl_templates.isolation_room_ready: the isolation room is ready for {?patient_case}
predicate_nl_templates.multidisciplinary_assigned: {?patient_case} is assigned to a multidisciplinary team
predicate_nl_templates.ppe_verified: personal protective equipment is verified for {?patient_case}
predicate_nl_templates.lab_authorization: lab authorization is given for {?patient_case} for {?laboratory_service}
predicate_nl_templates.specimen_routed: the specimen for {?patient_case} is routed to {?laboratory_service}
predicate_nl_templates.monitoring_ready_flag: the monitoring ready flag is set for {?patient_case}
predicate_nl_templates.env_service_team_available: the environmental service team {?environmental_service_team} is available
predicate_nl_templates.channel_compatible_with_case: {?intake_channel} is compatible with the patient case {?patient_case}
predicate_nl_templates.bed_compatible_with_case: {?inpatient_bed} is compatible with the patient case {?patient_case}
predicate_nl_templates.supply_compatible_with_case: {?clinical_supply} is compatible with the patient case {?patient_case}
predicate_nl_templates.protocol_applicable_to_case: {?isolation_protocol} is applicable to the patient case {?patient_case}
predicate_nl_templates.transport_assignable_to_case: {?transport_asset} is assignable to the patient case {?patient_case}
predicate_nl_templates.device_compatible_with_case: {?diagnostic_device} is compatible with the patient case {?patient_case}
predicate_nl_templates.specimen_required_for_case: {?specimen_kit} is required for the patient case {?patient_case}
predicate_nl_templates.assignment_unit_eligible_for_case: {?assignment_unit} is eligible for the patient case {?patient_case}
predicate_nl_templates.entity_linked_to_lab_service: {?patient_case} is linked to the laboratory service {?laboratory_service}
predicate_nl_templates.lab_service_linked_to_case: {?laboratory_service} is linked to the patient case {?patient_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.assign_intake_channel: assign an intake channel {?intake_channel} to a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_intake_channel_allocation: release allocation of an intake channel {?intake_channel} from a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_isolation_room: reserve an isolation room {?isolation_room} for a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.cancel_isolation_room_reservation: cancel reservation of an isolation room {?isolation_room} for a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_room_preparation: confirm preparation of an isolation room {?isolation_room} for a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_ppe_kit_to_case: assign a ppe kit {?ppe_kit} to a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_environmental_turnover: perform environmental turnover for a case entity {?patient_case} in an isolation room {?isolation_room} with an environmental service team {?environmental_service_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.collect_and_prepare_specimen: collect and prepare specimen for a case entity {?patient_case} with a laboratory service {?laboratory_service}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_clinical_supply: release a clinical supply {?clinical_supply} from a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_isolation_protocol: apply an isolation protocol {?isolation_protocol} to a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_isolation_protocol: release an isolation protocol {?isolation_protocol} from a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_transport_asset: reserve a transport asset {?transport_asset} for a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_transport_asset: release a transport asset {?transport_asset} from a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_specimen_kit: reserve a specimen kit {?specimen_kit} for a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_specimen_kit: release a specimen kit {?specimen_kit} from a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_bed_and_admit: assign an inpatient bed {?inpatient_bed} and admit a case entity {?patient_case} with a clinical supply {?clinical_supply} and an isolation protocol {?isolation_protocol}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_bed_with_diagnostic_device_and_ad: assign an inpatient bed {?inpatient_bed} and a diagnostic device {?diagnostic_device} and admit a case entity {?patient_case} with a transport asset {?transport_asset}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_initial_admission_status: complete initial admission status for a case entity {?patient_case} with a clinical supply {?clinical_supply} and an isolation protocol {?isolation_protocol}
action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_multidisciplinary_care: initiate multidisciplinary care for a case entity {?patient_case} with a clinical supply {?clinical_supply}, an isolation protocol {?isolation_protocol}, and a nurse team {?nurse_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_multidisciplinary_with_physician: assign multidisciplinary team with physician for a case entity {?patient_case} using a transport asset {?transport_asset}, a specimen kit {?specimen_kit}, and a physician team {?physician_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.progress_care_to_active_management: progress care to active management for a case entity {?patient_case} using a clinical supply {?clinical_supply} and an isolation protocol {?isolation_protocol}
action_nl_templates_indef.reprepare_room_after_turnover: reprepare an isolation room {?isolation_room} after turnover for a case entity {?patient_case} with an environmental service team {?environmental_service_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.verify_provider_readiness: verify provider readiness for a case entity {?patient_case} in an isolation room {?isolation_room}
action_nl_templates_indef.verify_provider_readiness_with_ppe_kit: verify provider readiness for a case entity {?patient_case} using a ppe kit {?ppe_kit}
action_nl_templates_indef.route_specimen_to_lab_service: route specimen for a case entity {?patient_case} to a laboratory service {?laboratory_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_lab_routing: authorize lab routing for a workflow coordinator {?workflow_coordinator} by a staff member {?staff_member} to a laboratory service {?laboratory_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_room_turnover_check: perform room turnover check for a case entity {?patient_case} in an isolation room {?isolation_room} with an environmental service team {?environmental_service_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_isolation_cleared: mark isolation cleared for a case entity {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_isolation_cleared_with_lab_result: mark isolation cleared for a case entity {?patient_case} with lab result from a laboratory service {?laboratory_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_isolation_cleared_with_monitoring: mark isolation cleared for a case entity {?patient_case} with monitoring

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a physical entity is also a object

Everything that is a case entity or a intake channel or a inpatient bed or a isolation protocol or a clinical supply or a transport asset or a isolation room or a ppe kit or a laboratory service or a environmental service team or a diagnostic device or a specimen kit or a assignment unit is also a physical entity
Everything that is a nurse team or a physician team is also a assignment unit
Everything that is a staff member or a workflow coordinator is also a case entity
